name: Ahlers AG
summary: Ahlers AG, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells men's fashion products in Europe, Germany, and Russia. The company offers its products under the Baldessarini, Pierre Cardin, Otto Kern, Pioneer Jeans, and Pionier Workwear brand names. It markets and sells its products through physical retail stores, chain stores, and department stores; mono-brand stores; and online shops. The company was founded in 1919 and is headquartered in Herford, Germany. Ahlers AG is a subsidiary of WTW-Beteiligungsgesellschaft mbH.
